title: Add logs and metrics support to OtelExporter

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: feat(observability): add ObservabilityBus, metrics, and structured logging
similarOrDuplicatePRs.author: epinzur
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relationship: Same author merged a follow-up PR (#13612) that adds ObservabilityBus, metrics, and structured logging to core. This PR was opened before #13612 but never merged; the merged PR likely incorporates or supersedes this work.

summary: Extends the @mastra/otel-exporter package to support logs and metrics in addition to traces. Adds log-converter.ts (Mastra LogLevel to OTEL SeverityNumber mapping), metric-converter.ts (counter/gauge/histogram instrument caching), Grafana Cloud provider config, and per-signal enable/disable. The diff includes 12 source files in observability/otel-exporter plus pnpm-lock.yaml. The single commit was authored by Claude (AI-generated). CodeRabbit left 7 actionable review comments including suggestions about native OTEL trace context fields for log correlation and gauge storage efficiency.
maintainerNotes: This PR was opened 2026-02-26 but the same author (epinzur) subsequently opened and merged PR #13612 on 2026-03-03 which adds the ObservabilityBus, metrics, and structured logging to core. This PR has merge conflicts (CONFLICTING state) and CI failures (Core, Memory, Full Test Suite). The branch name 'claude/add-notion-folder-X7c8S' is auto-generated and doesn't match the content. No changeset is included. The 'changeset' CI check is skipping. The code was generated by Claude in a single commit. Given that #13612 was merged with overlapping scope by the same author, this PR is likely superseded or needs significant rebasing. Ask epinzur whether this PR is still needed or should be closed in favor of the merged work.
